parameters.jsCode: return [{json:{groqKeys:['K1','K2','K3','K4'],geminiKeys:['G1','G2','G3','G4'],rapidApiKeys:['R1','R2','R3','R4'],groqDailyLimit:14400,geminiDailyLimit:1000,scoreThreshold:60,freshnessMaxDays:14,userEmailDailyLimit:50}}];
return [{json:{name:'User',email:'user@gmail.com',skills:['Python','Node.js'],keywords:'backend',resumeUrl:'https://drive.google.com/file/d/ID/view',telegramChatId:'123'}}];

const s=this.getWorkflowStaticData('global');const c=$('Backend Config').item.json;const d=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];if(!s.ai||s.ai.reset!==d){s.ai={groq:{i:0,c:[0,0,0,0]},gemini:{i:0,c:[0,0,0,0]},prov:'groq',reset:d};}let key='',prov=s.ai.prov,url='',model='';if(prov==='groq'){let f=false;for(let i=s.ai.groq.i;i<4;i++){if(s.ai.groq.c[i]<c.groqDailyLimit){key=c.groqKeys[i];s.ai.groq.i=i;f=true;break;}}if(!f){s.ai.prov='gemini';prov='gemini';}else{url='https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/chat/completions';model='llama-3.3-70b-versatile';}}if(prov==='gemini'){let f=false;for(let i=s.ai.gemini.i;i<4;i++){if(s.ai.gemini.c[i]<c.geminiDailyLimit){key=c.geminiKeys[i];s.ai.gemini.i=i;f=true;break;}}if(!f){prov='exhausted';}else{url='https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-2.0-flash:generateContent';model='gemini-2.0-flash';}}return [{json:{...items[0].json,aiKey:key,aiProv:prov,aiUrl:url,aiModel:model,aiDone:prov==='exhausted'}}];
return [{json:{resumeParsed:true,resumeData:{skills:['Python','AWS']}}}];
return items.filter(i=>!i.json.empty&&i.json.jobTitle);
const s=new Set();return items.filter(i=>{const k=(i.json.jobTitle+'|'+i.json.company).toLowerCase();if(s.has(k))return false;s.add(k);return true;});

const max=14;const now=new Date();return items.filter(i=>{if(!i.json.postedDate)return true;const d=Math.floor((now-new Date(i.json.postedDate))/(86400000));if(d>max)return false;i.json.daysOld=d;i.json.priority=d<=2?'HIGH':d<=7?'NORMAL':'LOW';return true;});
const jobs=items;const msg=`Found ${jobs.length} jobs scoring >= 60`;return [{json:{message:msg,chatId:$('User Profile').item.json.telegramChatId}}];

const s=this.getWorkflowStaticData('global');const today=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];if(!s.emailsSent)s.emailsSent={};if(!s.emailsSent[today])s.emailsSent[today]={count:0,jobs:[]};const stored=s.discoveredJobs||[];const ready=stored.filter(j=>j.recruiterEmail&&!s.emailsSent[today].jobs.includes(j.jobId));if(!ready.length)return[{json:{noJobs:true,message:'No jobs ready for outreach'}}];return ready.map(j=>({json:j}));

const s=this.getWorkflowStaticData('global');const config=$('Backend Config').item.json;const today=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];if(!s.emailsSent)s.emailsSent={};if(!s.emailsSent[today])s.emailsSent[today]={count:0,jobs:[]};const sent=s.emailsSent[today].count;const limit=config.userEmailDailyLimit||50;const remaining=limit-sent;if(remaining<=0)return[{json:{limitReached:true,message:'Daily limit ('+sent+'/'+limit+'). Tomorrow.'}}];const jobs=items.filter(i=>!i.json.noJobs).slice(0,remaining);if(!jobs.length)return[{json:{limitReached:true,message:'No jobs to email'}}];return jobs.map(i=>({json:{...i.json,limitReached:false}}));

const s=this.getWorkflowStaticData('global');const today=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];if(!s.emailsSent)s.emailsSent={};if(!s.emailsSent[today])s.emailsSent[today]={count:0,jobs:[]};s.emailsSent[today].count++;s.emailsSent[today].jobs.push(items[0].json.jobId);return[{json:{...items[0].json,status:'Applied',emailSentAt:new Date().toISOString()}}];

const user=$('User Profile').item.json;const sent=items.filter(i=>i.json.status==='Applied');const s=this.getWorkflowStaticData('global');const today=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];const total=(s.emailsSent||{})[today]?.count||0;let msg=`Outreach Done: ${sent.length} applications. Total: ${total}/50\n`;sent.slice(0,10).forEach((j,i)=>{msg+=`${i+1}. ${j.json.jobTitle} at ${j.json.company}\n`;});return[{json:{message:msg,chatId:user.telegramChatId}}];

const s=this.getWorkflowStaticData('global');if(!s.discoveredJobs)s.discoveredJobs=[];const ids=new Set(s.discoveredJobs.map(j=>j.jobId));for(const i of items){if(i.json.jobId&&!ids.has(i.json.jobId))s.discoveredJobs.push(i.json);}if(s.discoveredJobs.length>500)s.discoveredJobs=s.discoveredJobs.slice(-500);return items;
